en: and we got cracked.
She's so pathetic.
Let me tell you something about Janice, Ian.
We were best friends in middle school. I know, right? It's so embarrassing.
ko: 우리는 중학교 때 가장 친한 친구였어. 그렇지? 정말 창피해.

en: I don't even, whatever. So then in eighth grade,
I started going out with my first boyfriend, Kyle,
who was totally gorgeous, but then he moved to Indiana.
And Janice was like weirdly jealous of him.
Like if I would blow her off to hang out with Kyle,
she'd be like, why didn't you call me back?
ko: 그녀는 왜 나한테 전화 안 했냐고 물었어.

en: And I'd be like, why are you so obsessed with me? So then for my birthday party,
ko: 그래서 나는 왜 그렇게 나에게 집착하냐고 했지. 생일 파티 때,

en: which was an all-girls pool party,
I was like, Janice, I can't invite you
ko: 나는 제니스에게 초대할 수 없다고 했어.

en: because I think you're a lesbian.
I mean, I couldn't have a lesbian at my party.
ko: 내 파티에 레즈비언은 안 될 것 같았어.

en: There could be girls there in their bathing suits. I mean, right? She was a lesbian.
ko: 수영복 입은 여자애들이 있을 수도 있으니까. 맞지? 그녀는 레즈비언이었어.

en: So then her mom called my mom and started yelling at her.
ko: 그래서 그녀의 엄마가 내 엄마에게 전화해서 소리쳤어.

en: It was so retarded. And then she dropped out of school because no one would talk to her.
ko: 정말 어이없었어. 그리고 그녀는 아무도 말해주지 않아서 학교를 그만두었어.

en: When she came back in the fall for high school,
all of her hair was cut off and she was totally weird. Now I guess she's on crack.
ko: 그녀의 머리는 모두 잘려 있었고 완전히 이상해졌어. 이제 그녀는 아마 마약을 하고 있는 것 같아.
